marketSummary: US-Share markets are currently in a pre-market rally driven by optimism surrounding potential diplomatic efforts to end the US-Iran war. Indices show robust gains, with the Nasdaq (+1.96%) and PHLX Semiconductor Index (+2.04%) leading the charge. Data from Yahoo Finance reflects a positive sentiment shift, as reduced conflict concerns support risk-on assets and temper safe-haven demand, evidenced by Gold's -0.71% decline. Conversely, WTI oil is up 1.77%, highlighting lingering supply concerns due to the Hormuz situation. The market trend is continuing a recovery phase as institutional investors reallocate capital into growth sectors. Beijing Time: 2026-04-15 18:37:13 CST.
